_instructions: EDIT THIS FILE ONLY. All website sections, resume page, and downloadable files read from here. No code changes needed.

meta.siteTitle: Pavan Kalyan Gollapalli — Data Engineer Portfolio
meta.siteDescription: Data Engineer specializing in PySpark, AWS, Databricks, and real-time streaming pipelines.

profile.name: Pavan Kalyan Gollapalli
profile.title: Data Engineer
profile.tagline: Building scalable data pipelines that turn raw bytes into business decisions.

summary: Data Engineer with 4+ years of experience architecting production-grade batch and real-time data pipelines across AWS and Databricks. Proven track record processing 500 GB–1 TB weekly ETL workloads, migrating 20+ TB of privacy-sensitive data across 50+ enterprise applications, and building a FastAPI-backed data layer that reduced order retrieval latency by 40%. Deep expertise in PySpark, Apache Spark, Spark SQL, Apache Iceberg, CDC, and Apache Airflow. AWS Certified Data Engineer (Associate), AWS Certified AI Practitioner, and Databricks Data Engineer (Associate).

experience.project: Real-Time Backlog Engine — Enterprise Order Management
bullets: Architected an end-to-end real-time streaming ETL pipeline using PySpark and Python (Pandas) to ingest and process high-velocity nested JSON data from enterprise order management systems, sustaining 500K+ records/day at sub-minute latency.

Engineered a multi-layer JSON flattening engine parsing 5–8 levels of nesting across 150+ fields per record, converting raw streaming data into structured, analytics-ready datasets with 99.7% schema consistency.

Designed and deployed a FastAPI-based data transfer service with REST endpoints exposing enriched order data to downstream consumers, reducing average data retrieval latency by 40% and enabling self-serve access for 3+ enterprise teams.
Tuned PySpark partitioning strategies, broadcast joins, and parallelism configurations to increase streaming pipeline throughput by 35%, maintaining 99.9% uptime under peak enterprise workloads.
Implemented multi-stage error handling, schema validation checkpoints, and dead-letter queues, achieving <0.01% data loss rate and full end-to-end data integrity from ingestion to API delivery.

experience.project: Payment Data Integration & Processing — Banking Domain
bullets: Developed and optimized PySpark ETL pipelines for high-volume banking datasets ingested from AWS S3, improving ETL throughput by 30% and data accuracy across critical payment processing workflows.
Executed multi-environment data validation and migration checks (dev, staging, UAT, production) ensuring 100% data consistency across banking ledger tables prior to production promotion.
Automated CI/CD pipeline deployments using Python and Git-based workflows, cutting manual deployment intervention by ~8 hours/week and reducing production failure rate by 30%.

experience.project: Multiple Projects: Geospatial Analytics, Social Media Migration, Data Privacy
bullets: Designed a dimensional data model (2 fact tables, 11 dimension tables) for large-scale geospatial data marts, enabling efficient OLAP queries across spatial datasets for enterprise reporting.
Built automated PySpark and Spark SQL ETL pipelines processing 500 GB–1 TB weekly, incorporating CDC mechanisms that maintained 99.8% incremental update accuracy.
Processed 1M+ nested JSON API records daily, flattening 200+ GB of raw social media data into structured tables — delivering 20% storage reduction and 35% query performance improvement.
Migrated 20+ TB of privacy-sensitive data across 50+ applications encompassing 3,000+ tables using Teradata, AWS S3, MinIO, and CSV-based transfer pipelines — achieving full regulatory compliance.
Built an automated QA validation framework reducing manual testing effort by 80%+ — recognized at TCS Innovista for operational efficiency.

projects.title: Real-Time Order Backlog Engine
projects.description: End-to-end streaming ETL pipeline + FastAPI service processing 500K+ records/day. Achieved 99.9% uptime, <0.01% data loss, and 40% latency improvement for 3 enterprise downstream teams.

projects.title: Geospatial Analytics Data Mart
projects.description: Dimensional model (2 facts, 11 dims) with weekly PySpark/Spark SQL ETL processing up to 1 TB. CDC accuracy 99.8% across all load cycles.

projects.title: Social Media Data Migration
projects.description: Ingested 1M+ JSON records/day with 500 GB/day PySpark CDC loads. Achieved 20% storage saving and 35% query speedup across production environments.

projects.title: Enterprise Data Privacy Migration
projects.description: Migrated 20+ TB of privacy-sensitive data across 50+ applications and 3,000+ tables. Achieved 95% error reduction and full regulatory compliance.

education.note: Transitioned into Data Engineering through self-directed upskilling in distributed computing, cloud platforms, and Python — validated by AWS and Databricks certifications.

achievements.title: Deloitte Excellence Award
achievements.description: Delivered the Real-Time Backlog Engine ahead of schedule. The FastAPI-backed streaming pipeline reduced order data retrieval latency by 40% for 3+ downstream enterprise teams, directly improving SLA adherence.

achievements.title: TCS Innovista Recognition
achievements.description: Built an automated QA validation framework achieving 80%+ reduction in manual testing effort and accelerating critical issue identification across the Data Privacy Migration program.
